rationale: Corpus has no 'Principal/Director+' points for this tier, and the 'Senior/Staff' bucket used for L5 doesn't cleanly disambiguate a distinct Staff-level anchor above L5. No additional Staff-specific external data found. Current base p50 $188K is a plausible step up from the L5 corpus ceiling ($201K high end of Senior/Staff bucket) but not independently confirmed. Keeping low.
